CREATE TABLE test_table (k String, w UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY k;
SELECT approx_top_sum(2)(k, w) FROM (SELECT k, count(w) as total_weight FROM test_table GROUP BY k);
CREATE TABLE test_table2 (a String, b UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY a;
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES ('y', 1), ('x', 5), ('y', 1), ('z', 10); SELECT approx_top_sum(2)(k, w) FROM (SELECT k, sum(w) as weight FROM test_table GROUP BY k) WHERE weight > 2;
SELECT approx_top_sum(4)(k, w) FROM (SELECT k, w FROM test_table WHERE w < 10) as filtered_table;
SELECT approx_top_sum(10, 3)(k, w) FROM (SELECT k, w FROM test_table ORDER BY w DESC LIMIT 100) as limited_table;
SELECT approx_top_sum(15)(k, w) FROM (SELECT k, sum(w) AS total_weight FROM test_table GROUP BY k HAVING total_weight > 2);
SELECT approx_top_sum(1)(k, max(w)) FROM (SELECT k, sum(w) AS total_weight FROM test_table GROUP BY k) GROUP BY k HAVING total_weight > 0;
